keystones.name: Ancestral Bond
stats: Your Totem Limit is doubled · No Charge requirement for placing Totems · Totems reserve 75 Spirit each

keystones.name: Avatar of Fire
stats: 75% of Damage Converted to Fire Damage · Deal no Non-Fire Damage

keystones.name: Blackflame Covenant
stats: Fire Spells Convert 100% of Fire Damage to Chaos Damage · Chaos Damage from Fire Spells Contributes to Flammability and Ignite Magnitudes · Ignite inflicted with Fire Spells deals Chaos Damage instead of Fire Damage

keystones.name: Blood Magic
stats: You have no Mana · Skill Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs

keystones.name: Bulwark
stats: Dodge Roll cannot Avoid Damage · Take 30% less Damage from Hits while Dodge Rolling

keystones.name: Chaos Inoculation
stats: Maximum Life is 1 · Immune to Chaos Damage and Bleeding

keystones.name: Conduit
stats: If you would gain a Charge, Allies in your Presence gain that Charge instead

keystones.name: Crimson Assault
stats: Bleeding you inflict is Aggravated · Base Bleeding Duration is 1 second · 50% more Magnitude of Bleeding you inflict

keystones.name: Dance with Death
stats: 25% more Skill Speed while Off Hand is empty and you have · a One-Handed Martial Weapon equipped in your Main Hand

keystones.name: Eldritch Battery
stats: Convert 100% of maximum Energy Shield to maximum Mana · Mana Costs are Doubled

keystones.name: Elemental Equilibrium
stats: Create Lightning Infusion Remnants instead of Fire · Create Cold Infusion Remnants instead of Lightning · Create Fire Infusion Remnants instead of Cold

keystones.name: Eternal Youth
stats: Life Recharges instead of Energy Shield · 50% less Life Recovery from Flasks

keystones.name: Giant's Blood
stats: You can wield Two-Handed Axes, Maces and Swords in one hand · Triple Attribute requirements of Martial Weapons · Inherent Life granted by Strength is halved

keystones.name: Glancing Blows
stats: Chance to Evade is Unlucky · Chance to Deflect is Lucky

keystones.name: Heartstopper
stats: Take 50% less Damage over Time if you've started taking Damage over Time in the past second · Take 50% more Damage over Time if you haven't started taking Damage over Time in the past second

keystones.name: Hollow Palm Technique
stats: Can Attack as though using a Quarterstaff while both of your hand slots are empty · Unarmed Attacks that would use an Equipped Quarterstaff's damage have: · • Base Unarmed Physical damage replaced with damage based on their Skill Level · • 1% more Attack Speed per 75 Item Evasion on Equipped Armour Items · • +0.1% to Critical Hit Chance per 10 Item Energy Shield on Equipped Armour Items

keystones.name: Iron Reflexes
stats: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour

keystones.name: Lord of the Wilds
stats: You can equip a non-Unique Sceptre while wielding a Talisman · 50% less Spirit · Non-Minion Skills have 50% less Reservation Efficiency

keystones.name: Mind Over Matter
stats: All Damage is taken from Mana before Life · 50% less Mana Recovery Rate

keystones.name: Necromantic Talisman
stats: All bonuses from Equipped Amulet apply to your Minions instead of you

keystones.name: Oasis
stats: Cannot use Charms · 30% more Recovery from Flasks

keystones.name: Pain Attunement
stats: 30% less Critical Damage Bonus when on Full Life · 30% more Critical Damage Bonus when on Low Life

keystones.name: Primal Hunger
stats: 100% more Maximum Rage · Regenerate 1 Rage per second per 4 Rage spent Recently · No Rage effect

keystones.name: Resolute Technique
stats: Accuracy Rating is Doubled · Never deal Critical Hits

keystones.name: Resonance
stats: Gain Power Charges instead of Frenzy Charges · Gain Frenzy Charges instead of Endurance Charges · Gain Endurance Charges instead of Power Charges

keystones.name: Ritual Cadence
stats: Invocation Skills instead Trigger Spells every 2 seconds · Invocation Skills cannot gain Energy while Triggering Spells · Invoked Spells consume 50% less Energy

keystones.name: Scarred Faith
stats: 5% of Physical Damage prevented Recouped as Energy Shield per enemy Power · Energy Shield does not Recharge · You cannot Recover Energy Shield from Regeneration · You cannot Recover Energy Shield to above Armour

keystones.name: Trusted Kinship
stats: You can have two Companions of different types · 30% more Reservation Efficiency of Companion Skills · 20% less Reservation Efficiency of non-Companion Skills

keystones.name: Unwavering Stance
stats: Cannot be Light Stunned · Cannot Dodge Roll or Sprint

keystones.name: Vaal Pact
stats: 50% more amount of Life Leeched · Leech Life 67% less quickly · Cannot Recover Life other than from Leech · Life Leech effects are not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled

keystones.name: Whispers of Doom
stats: You can apply an additional Curse · Double Activation Delay of Curses

keystones.name: Wildsurge Incantation
stats: Storm and Plant Spells: · • deal 50% more damage · • cost 50% less · • have 75% less duration

keystones.name: Zealot's Oath
stats: Excess Life Recovery from Regeneration is applied to Energy Shield · Energy Shield does not Recharge
